title: Location Coordinates not accurate on Map View
excerpt:
When using location coordinates in the Location Column. The location does not show u correctly on the Map View. It picks a location adress near the coordinate. Why is this happening? And when can this be fixed? 
Do other…

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using location coordinates in the Location Column. The location does not show u correctly on the Map View. It picks a location adress near the coordinate. Why is this happening? And when can this be fixed?

Do others have the same experience?

I have had contact with Support and gave them al the details. Coordinates give a correct location on Google Maps.

posts.author: bob1 (bob)
posts.cookedHtml: Same problem here, pls fix. Very annoying.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi both,

This is indeed behaviour of the platform. Within our app Location Toolkit we’ve build a feature called “Map Picker” which allows you to select an exact location on a map and saves it with the exact coordinates (even if they don’t map to an existing address).

If you already have a list of coordinates and don’t want to select a location on a map you can use our other app Location Importer which allows you to convert any text column into a Location Column and supports both latitude/longitude coordinates as well as DMS.

You can give both apps a free trial for 14 days (without any commitment).

Best,

Maarten
